name: html-effectiveness
description: Routes agent output to self-contained .html via 21 patterns (20 from Thariq's catalog + 1 agent-spawn-deck added here: triage board, status report, code review, design system...) and a fuzzy EN+DE intent decision tree. Fork of @trq212's work.

interface.shortDescription: Routes agent output to single self-contained .html files based on Thariq Shihipar's html-effectiveness pattern catalog.…
interface.longDescription: Routes agent output to single self-contained .html files based on Thariq Shihipar's html-effectiveness pattern catalog. 20 canonical patterns (triage board, status report, code review, design system, prompt tuner, etc.) with a data-driven decision tree so Claude picks the right pattern per task. Includes OTel semconv generator demo as concrete proof.
defaultPrompt: Use HTML Effectiveness on this repo.
